[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011101110 7
1 1101111110 8
2 0000110101 4
3 0111010110 6
4 1110011011 7

6 1010000000 2
7 0101010111 6
